text.message: We can trade brick for wood black

feels to early to solo blue
alright where do you think then? 8 or 6 right?
Couldnt block both u and black
have yall noticed the game says people are answering but theyre not?
yeah but its not fair to hit oj at all at this point
my blocking situation is so unfortunate
Youre in the middle, thats the downside
The upside is you can expans a lot
too bad i dont have the brick for all that
should be playing a dev game
Youre two roads away from 9 points, blue
and u drop two roads for 9
yeah but if they wrap 6 and settle we're cooked
oj i have wood for u to plow red's settle
do you need it or can u do it without?
not sure ill be able to do
i have two wood, maybe blue can help
I need a brick 3 wood and a sheep
Other people might be closer to win than me
ok i have a sheep and wood
i also have wheat you can potentially port
maybe i can get u the wheat for free
agh cant give up there man
im sure we coulda figured that out
still, you and i coulda figured it out
i assume u have game anyway
Bad play black not taking roads
